jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Roche India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Roche India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
